personal_information.headline: Aspiring IT Enthusiast | Passionate about Data Science, Machine Learning, and IoT | Eager to Explore and Contribute to the World of Technology.
personal_information.summary: I am a computer science graduate focused on applied machine learning, data science, and intelligent systems. With a background in electronics and data-driven problem solving, I work on building AI-powered solutions at the intersection of data, automation, and IoT. My approach emphasizes structured analysis, system-level thinking, and practical implementation rather than surface-level experimentation. I am open to technical roles, research-oriented projects, and collaborations that prioritize real-world impact.

certifications: Custom Models, Layers, and Loss Functions with TensorFlow
honors_and_awards: 2nd Place Winner - IoT Category | Ignition Informatics 2024
2nd Place Winner in Artificial Intelligence - ARCADIA Award 2026

experience.description: Developed and continuously improved company systems, including ERP, internal tools, automation workflows, and web-based business applications. Gathered and translated business requirements into scalable technical solutions, contributing to sprint planning and feature prioritization. Designed, developed, and maintained full-stack web applications, covering both frontend and backend development. Leveraged AI-assisted development to accelerate software delivery, improve engineering efficiency, and streamline development workflows. Implemented automation and AI-driven solutions to optimize operational processes and reduce manual work. Managed deployment, VPS infrastructure, server configuration, monitoring, and production maintenance to ensure system reliability and performance. Performed debugging, testing, and continuous system enhancements to improve functionality, usability, and business impact.

experience.company: Bangkit Academy led by Google, Tokopedia, Gojek, & Traveloka
